entities.name: PARTICIPATORY INTEGRATED CLIMATE SERVICES FOR AGRICULTURE (PICSA)
entities.description: An approach to extension and climate information services that uses climate records, decision-making tools, and forecasts to help farmers plan livelihood options.

entities.name: CLIMATE RISK
entities.description: The risk posed by climate variability and change to agricultural livelihoods.

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A country in West Africa where the PICSA approach was implemented.

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: A country in West Africa where the PICSA approach was implemented.

entities.name: HISTORICAL CLIMATE RECORDS
entities.description: Past climate data used to inform agricultural planning within the PICSA approach.

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY DECISION-MAKING TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used by farmers to identify and plan livelihood options based on climate data.

entities.name: FORECASTS
entities.description: Climate predictions used to help farmers plan their agricultural activities.

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD OPTIONS
entities.description: Strategic choices made by farmers to sustain their living and farming activities.

entities.name: LOCAL CLIMATE FEATURES
entities.description: The specific climate characteristics of a local area that influence farming decisions.

entities.name: SOWING DATES
entities.description: The specific timing for planting crops, adjusted based on climate information.

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural techniques used to conserve soil and water, stimulated by the PICSA approach.

entities.name: CROP VARIETIES
entities.description: Different types of crop seeds selected by farmers to suit climate conditions.

entities.name: FERTILISER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of optimizing fertilizer application, stimulated by the PICSA approach.

entities.name: FARMER-TO-FARMER EXTENSION
entities.description: A peer-led approach to scaling up agricultural extension services.

entities.name: WEST AFRICAN REGION
entities.description: The geographical region encompassing Mali and Senegal.
